ksa_text: Determine risks of operating or using systems and establish monitoring strategies to identify and track operational security threats.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA SP-T-010 (Security and Privacy/Task) excluded as out_of_scope (composite 0.507, highest: EU AI Act at 0.507). Domain prior: out. Core hits: 0. OOS hits: 0. Seniority: appropriate. Data asset valuation analysis: data ROI measurement, value quantification frameworks, infonomics application, and data quality-value correlation analysis.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Exclude consistent with out_of_scope classification, composite 0.507, and Security and Privacy (SP) handling.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence challenge the exclusion of this Security and Privacy KSA (composite 0.507)?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Market analysis of Data Valuation Analyst job postings does not surface this Security and Privacy competency as a standard requirement at the relevant level. Exclusion consistent with role focus.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Exclusion upheld. Market evidence consistent with exclusion. Final decision: exclude.
